messages.content: u doing anything this weekend
lily has a playdate saturday. maybe a ride sunday
brunch sunday?? jubala?
yes plz
10ish?
perfect see u there
omg omg omg
ok so remember derek from velvet chapel
the manager guy?
yes. he runs a little label now. ember records
he wants album covers for 3 releases next year
wait really
$1500 for all 3. 500 per cover. he wants that collage style we did for the gig poster
V thats actually really good money
right?? theres a show at cats cradle on the 15th. he'll be there. come meet him
let me check if i have lily that week
no its trevors week im free
perfect. ill get us on the list
im so exicted lol
ok wait totally different topic
when are u going to portugal
lolol ive been looking at flights
u HAVE to do this trip. lisbon is insane
sintra is literally a fairytale i cried at pena palace in 2019
ok the problem is $$
how much
like 4500-5000 for 10 days. i have 2800 saved
sell some stocks lol
honestly considering it
just bought tix for saturday btw
yesss the cats cradle show??
ya. 2 GA
ok so derek will def be there. ill intro u
last night was so fun
derek is so nice. cant believe he showed us those demos backstage
told u!! and he loved ur portfolio
i showed him the gallagher gig poster on my phone lol
hes gonna email me the details this week
ok this is actually happening huh
ITS HAPPENING
ok so the three bands are velvet chapel, moth & lantern, and this new group called the silt
moth and lantern is such a good name
right. theyre like dreampop shoegaze vibes
ok i have ideas already
what if each cover has a different texture. velvet chapel gets the polaroid collage, moth gets watercolor
ooh yes
and the silt could be something gritty. like screen print
exactly. 3 covers 3 styles but same color palette tying them together
this is why i need u on this
stop lol
no fr. lets start w velvet chapel since derek knows them best
agreed. ill sketch some stuff this weekend in procreate
still on for tmrw?
yep. lilys at trevors so im free all evening
ill bring wine lol
i printed dereks reference photos. bringing my ipad too
tmrw night still good for round 2?
ya. how far along r u on velvet chapel
like 60% maybe. collage layer is done but color grading needs work
bring it ill help
hows the cover coming
almost done. been working on it after lily goes to bed most nights
dont burn urself out
its fine its the fun kind of work
the way u should be working all the time tbh
dont start lol
did the budget math tonight
even with the ember money the trip is like 1700 short
ugh. cant you sell some of the stocks
idk the market has been weird
what about asking jun
he literally makes amazon money lol
and get a 45 min lecture about responsible spending? pass
ok ok ok hear me out
what if the velvet chapel cover is a polaroid collage but each one is slightly overexposed
ooh keep going
like the whole thing is washed out except one panel in the center thats super saturated
what color palette r u thinking
burnt orange and teal. maybe dusty pink
already sketching in procreate lol i cant stop
lmao of course u are. send me what u have
its rough but
ok this is actually sick. the texture is so good
also i jsut bought hornets tickets lol
girl its 2am
and khruangbin tix earlier. feb 14 at the ritz ur coming
lol valentines khruangbin im in. but seriously r u sleeping
i feel so good tho. like this year is gonna be the year we go all in on the creative stuff
i love that energy but pls go to bed
oh god
marcus just sent me a strava friend request
marcus from work marcus?
yes
v he would see everything
oh shit
the late night rides
those 1am rides from last week are literally right there on my profile
just dont accept it
but then its weird?? like hes gonna wonder why i didnt add him back
ppl ignore follow requests all the time. just leave it
i guess
seriously just pretend u never saw it. nobody checks that stuff
ok yeah ur right
omg v
he just emailed me about it at work
about strava??
asking for route recs and mentioned the follow request in the same email
what did u say
just gave him some routes and talked about the audit stuff. didnt mention the request at all
perfect just act normal and ignore it
my schwab account is down like 15% since october
wait what
yeah if i sell now id lose over a thousand dollars
so thats not an option for the trip anymore
ok so whats the plan
can u pick up another cover for ember
maybe. dereks been talking about a third one
update on the marcus strava thing
im just gonna leave it. not accepting not declining
good thats the move
like i cant risk him seeing those rides from last week
nobody ever follows up on a pending request. itll just disappear
went to blick after work
ooh what'd u get
gouache set, brushes, that strathmore paper u told me about
the 400 series mixed media??
ya
thats perfect for the moth cover. layering on that paper is so good
spent 127 tho
not bad for all that honestly
i guess. chase balance is like 2200 now
oof
its fine. ill just put it under lilys art stuff
lol she does paint a lot tbf
chase flagged the blick charge lmao
flagged how
unusual merchant category or whatever. like i dont normally buy art supplies on this card
ugh just dropped 585 at toyota
what why
45k service plus they said my brakes were basically gone
oof how much were the brakes
380 on top of the regular maintenance
thats brutal
there goes my portugal savings for this month
nooo u still have to go
idk v. math isnt mathing
the math will work out. u deserve this trip
well see lol
so the ember money is coming in this week
keep going back and forth on portugal vs putting it in lilys fund
christine. go to portugal.
you can always add to the fund later
jun would kill me
jun isnt the one who spent 2 yrs saving for this
trevor is trying to swap weeks again
the 22nd week. our wine tasting week
are u kidding me
can u say no
idk hes making it sound like i have no choice. work trip or whatever
what did u say
told him i have plans and hes done this 3 times in 4 months
good. u should make him go through rebecca for this stuff
honestly thinking about it
do it. hes been pulling this since november
emailed rebecca this morning
about documenting the swap requests
good. finally
she wrote back. says keep a log and save all the texts
u need to stop being so nice to that man
just told trevor to go through rebecca
GOOD
ok i caved. taking lily that week
can we move the wine thing to march
ugh yes of course. march works. hes the worst lol
at least lily will be happy about extra time
true. wine can wait
ugh. lilys parent teacher conf is friday at 10 and i have a dr appt at the same time
can u move the dr
just emailed them. hoping for afternoon
school stuff always takes priority
ya
dr moved to 2pm. conference then dr. long friday
at least its all in one day
conference done
how was it
really good actually. lily is ahead in reading. mrs keller loves her
of course she is. ur kid is amazing
math needs work but shes 7 so whatever
ok done with everything. long day
how was dr p
fine. same dose. quick check in
good. go take a nap lol
i wish. gotta go back to the office
so im planning lilys bday party
omg yay when
march 8. marla dorrel park
cute. theme?
unicorn lol
haha obviously
still need to find a cake place
try ladybird bakery on kildaire. they did my nieces bday cake last yr and it was so good
ooh ok ill look them up
want me to come help set up
yes pls
done. ill bring balloons
trevor didnt send child support
its supposed to hit by the 1st
wait seriously
yeah checked my account like 3 times today
has that happened before
no
which is like the one thing hes been consistent about
ugh
i texted him. he says he sent it
sure he did
im gonna give it til tmrw but if its not there im emailing rebecca
u should. document everything
it finally came through. 2 days late
glad it came but still tell rebecca
ugh
briar creek is raising my rent 75 bucks
wait what
how much now
thats insane. have u looked at other places
idk. moving with lily is so much. shes finally settled at montessori
ya thats fair. but 75 a month is 900 a year thats not nothing
i know. maybe ill look around just to see whats out there
do it. worst case u stay and at least u know
ya ur right
looking at zillow rn
lol already on it
anything good
not rly. everything near montessori is like 1400 minimum
and the cheaper ones are way far
far from school?
like 30 min each way. cant do that with the pickup schedule
nah definitely not worth it
no
sounds like ur staying then lol
probably. gonna look more this weekend tho just to be sure
ok so i spent all afternoon looking at apartments
everything sucks
lmaoo
im just gonna sign the renewal. its not worth the hassle
honestly prob the right call
75 bucks sucks but lilys stability matters more
exactly. thats what i keep telling myself
its the right thing
ok so i found this app called bonsai
u can send proper invoices to derek from it and it tracks all ur payments and income in one place. way better than venmo
want me to set u up? i already use it for my freelance stuff
Can we talk about the schedule
I have a work trip week of the 22nd. Need you to take Lily.
Trevor that's my free week. I have plans.
What plans.
I have commitments. You can't keep doing this last minute.
It's one week. I wouldn't ask if I didn't have to.
You know I always take her when you need me to
This is what you do. I ask for one thing and suddenly I'm the bad guy.
You've asked to swap 3 times in 4 months. It's always last minute.
Right. Must be nice to never have work come up.
I'm not doing this over text.
Fine.
I'll figure something out.
I'm sorry about last night. But I really do need this week.
Christine?
Going forward please direct any scheduling changes through Rebecca.
Seriously?
You're bringing lawyers into this over a schedule change.
Fine. Sunday 6pm. I'll drop her off.
Confirmed.
hey, lilys birthday is coming up. wanna do a party march 8
Ok. Where
marla dorrel park. the pavilion. 2 to 5
That's your week right.
yeah. pickup at 6 like normal after
Ok. Do you want me there
if u want. she'd like it
I'll come. What should I bring
nothing i got it
Let me know if that changes.
she wants roller skates btw. if ur looking for a present idea
Got it.
child support didnt come through today
I sent it.
its not in my account. usually hits by morning
I'll check with the bank.
Bank issue on their end. Should be there tomorrow.
ok
came through
Are you going to the conference Friday.
Yes. 10am.
Ok let me know what Mrs. Keller says.
Conference went fine. She's ahead in reading, math needs some practice. Teacher says she's great in class.
Good. Math was always hard for me too.
She got a progress report. I'll scan it.
What time should I come tomorrow.
130 if u wanna help set up. party starts at 2
Got her the roller skates btw.
nice shes gonna flip
pls dont be late
I won't.
On my way.
k
Hey, Lily's soccer registration is this weekend. Can you send me her insurance card?
They also need a list of household medications and any medical conditions for the emergency contact form. Can you fill that part out and send it over?
I can handle the rest of the paperwork
lmk
Told you.
hey, random question. my parents want to start contributing to lily's college fund. can you send me the account info so they can set up a monthly transfer?
they just need the routing number and account number and they can do it from their bank
hey. how are things
u have lily this week?
yeah! took her apple picking this weekend
thats awesome. how r u doing
good! work is busy. the usual
how was the dr appointment
fine. same as always
levels good?
yes jun lol. everything is fine
hows my favorite sister
im ur only sister lol. im good. went riding this morning
good keep it up
yes sir
hey. checking in
all good. audit season at work so im kinda buried
dont overdo it. u sleeping ok?
yes dad
how was the dr
good. everything stable
ok good. sleeping ok?
cpap is working fine right now. stop worrying
hey hows your week going
lily doing ok?
good! shes obsessed with this book about planets
haha thats cute. you sleeping ok? its getting cold there
yeah im good. busy at work but fine
hey are you sleeping ok
noticed you havent been riding much. everything alright?
lol are you tracking my strava
its just my cpap. the mask has been leaking so i wake up tired. ordering a new one
ok. have you called triangle sleep about it
yes jun i know how to manage my cpap lol
hey so ur planning a portugal trip?
how do u know that lol
mom told me. u mentioned it at thanksgiving
can you really afford that right now
ive been saving for it jun
i just dont want you putting yourself in a tough spot. you have lily to think about
i know. im being careful
ok. just looking out for you
i know
c are you taking the lithium
i dont want to be that guy but the riding dropping off plus the sleep stuff. i just worry
maybe come up to seattle for christmas. get out of raleigh for a bit
jun im fine. yes im taking it. its literally a cpap mask issue
i love you but you dont need to monitor my strava for warning signs
merry christmas sis. how was yesterday
good! lily loved her presents
u doing ok? sleeping?
hey hows the new year treating u
still planning that portugal thing?
yeah still saving up. its hard tho
look i dont want to be annoying but have you looked at what that trip actually costs
yes jun i have a spreadsheet lol
ok just making sure. the market is rough right now too
hey. how r u
hows the trip fund going
good. got some extra income coming in so it might actually work
extra income from what
just a freelance thing. design work
oh nice. thats cool. as long as ur not dipping into lilys fund
hey how was the dr today
fine. everything the same
same dose? levels ok?
yes jun. everything is fine. stop worrying
ok ok. love u
love u too
hey so have u thought any more about moving out here
lol jun no
im serious. rent is way cheaper here. u could live near me
lilys whole life is here. trevor is here. my job is here
amazon has compliance roles. youd make way more
not uprooting lily for a maybe
ok. just worry about u financially thats all
i know. were fine jun. staying put
hey havent seen you ride in a while. everything ok?
just checking
lol yes im fine. audit deadline this week plus lilys bday party last weekend. been swamped
oh right the party. how was it
so good. unicorn theme. she loved it
aww. tell her uncle jun says happy bday
will do
good to see you back on the bike!
haha do u just refresh my strava all day
guilty lol
felt good to get back out there. nice morning
hey so mom called me today asking about u
i showed her your strava. she was like wow christines been so active lately! four rides this week??
she also noticed some of them were pretty late at night lol. she said make sure christine is sleeping ok
hey chris how are things
good. busy as usual
hows the apartment situation
they raised my rent. 1525 now
thats a lot. you ok?
ya. its only 75 more but still annoying
75 a month adds up
ok. love u
love u too
give lily a hug for me
always
ur sleeping ok tho right
yes lol. just havent had time to ride
ok just checkin
i know. talk tmrw?
ya. night sis
shes growing up so fast
i know right. she asked for a microscope
haha a little scientist
thats what i said lol
glad its just work stuff and not anything else
what else would it be lol
nothing. just being ur annoying big brother
the most annoying
love u
hey i was looking at strava today and u had 3 rides after midnight this week
u sleeping ok? just checking in
want me to pull your activity data for the last couple months? sometimes its easier to see patterns from the outside
hey everyone! we need to start planning the holiday party for mrs kellers class
yes! when is it again?
dec 19 at 2pm
Im in for setup. what do we need
i can bring snacks
ok so far we need: food, decorations, plates/cups, and a craft activity for the kids
ill handle decorations. dollar tree has all the stuff
i can grab plates and cups from costco
lily wants to do a gingerbread house thing. ill get the kits
perfect! ill make a signup sheet and send it out tmrw
hey everyone! lilys turning 8 march 8th. party at marla dorrel park pavilion 2-5pm. would love for the kids to come!
omg yes!! well be there
yay!! nadia has been asking about lily. perfect timing
james is in. we need to bring anything?
just the kids! theres gonna be cake and snacks
i can bring juice boxes and fruit if u want
ill bring chips
u guys are amazing thank u
whats the theme
unicorn lol. lily chose it obviously
haha nadia is going to lose it she loves unicorns
james less thrilled about unicorns but hell survive lol
dont forget parent teacher conferences are friday! 10am for our class
is it just 15 min per kid?
yep. mrs keller said just show up at ur slot time
ill be there
mrs keller is so nice. she had such sweet things to say about all the kids
we just finished too. nadia got a great report
same for lily. reading is great math needs work but overall good
james too. good conference day all around
reminder!! lilys party is sunday at 2. marla dorrel park pavilion
yesss cant wait
is there parking at the park?
yeah theres a lot right by the pavilion
well be there
that was the cutest party!! emma had so much fun
nadia wont stop talking about the unicorn cake lol
aw thank u guys so much for coming
james wants to know when the next one is lol
ride tmrw? lake johnson?
im in. 7am?
can do 7. need to be back by 9 for lily
7 works. meet at the boathouse parking lot
count me in
nice forecast says 58 and sunny

im in

the 35k one ya
can we do 830 instead

lol

running late obv
that was amazing

omw
us looking fast

we should catch up!! ill be in charlotte for thanksgiving maybe i can swing by

yes!! the whole back row
